series_metadata.series_title: Safety Council New Enrollments, Deletions and Policy Number Updates
series_metadata.series_description: The safety council new enrollments, deletions and policy number updates consist of BWC policy numbers, number of employees, company name and location along with signatures of the person completing the enrollment form. This series is compiled by the safety council to enroll, delete and update policy numbers received by members to be considered members of one of the safety councils located around the state of Ohio.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: If scanned securely shred, if not scanned ; Electronic
